criminals.name: Lyra Moonshard
criminals.description: A quiet illusionist known for infiltrating royal vaults using moonlight-based glamour magic. Lyra prefers stealth and rarely harms anyone, leaving only faint silver motes behind after a heist.

criminals.name: Seraphine Emberveil
criminals.description: A charismatic fire mage who commands underground smuggling rings. Her temper is as infamous as her magic, and entire warehouses have been reduced to ash when negotiations failed.

criminals.name: Caelum Nightweaver
criminals.description: A shadow mage who manipulates starlight and darkness to slip through secure locations unnoticed. Caelum is rumored to have once stolen an artifact from a guarded celestial observatory.

criminals.name: Thalia Frostthorn
criminals.description: A frost-wielding duelist and former naval officer turned pirate mage. Thalia freezes entire harbors to immobilize ships before raiding their cargo.

criminals.name: Bastian Runegrave
criminals.description: A necromantic scholar obsessed with forbidden runic rituals. Bastian steals relics from ancient tombs to fuel his experiments.

criminals.name: Mira Verdantshade
criminals.description: A druidic infiltrator who uses living vines and forest magic to bypass defenses. Mira often targets corrupt nobles and vanishes into wilderness territories.

criminals.name: Orin Stormbreaker
criminals.description: A battle mage capable of summoning localized lightning strikes. Orin is often hired as magical muscle for high-risk robberies.

criminals.name: Kallista Shadebloom
criminals.description: An enchantress specializing in charm spells and memory manipulation. Many victims never realize they were robbed until days later.

criminals.name: Dorian Blacktide
criminals.description: A shadowy crime broker dealing in cursed artifacts and forbidden magic. Dorian rarely appears in person, preferring to orchestrate crimes through intermediaries.

criminals.name: Elric Sunfall
criminals.description: A brilliant but reckless alchemist who specializes in transmutation-based fraud and explosive concoctions used in daring escapes.
